source: tradestat.commerce.gov.in/eidb (DGCI&S) -- Commodity-wise Export and Commodity-wise Import reports
level: 2-digit HS chapter (98 of 99 possible chapters populated)
years_covered: FY2018-19 to FY2025-26 (FY2025-26 provisional, data last updated 19 May 2026 per source)
method: Laravel/Livewire form requires an active session (plain GET 405s); visited the search page first to get a session cookie + CSRF token, then POSTed comType=all / EidbComLevelCwe=2 / Eidb_ReportCwe=2 (or Cwi equivalents for imports) per year. Each query returns 2 fiscal years, so 4 queries per trade direction (8 total) covered all 8 years.
